description_long: This is a large, ancient-style ceramic vase with a rounded body, a wide mouth, and a narrow pedestal base. The exterior is adorned with classical black-figure artwork, depicting human figures in elaborate attire, likely inspired by Greek mythology or daily life. The vase features two small, rounded handles on opposite sides, positioned just below the rim. The surface shows signs of age, with visible patina, discoloration, and some surface wear, giving it an authentic, timeworn appearance. The coloration is predominantly earthy brown with black and faded red decorative elements. The interior appears unglazed and rough, consistent with traditional pottery techniques.
description: A large, ancient-style ceramic vase with black-figure artwork, rounded body, and two small handles, showing visible age and patina.
description_view_0: Front view showing detailed black-figure artwork of a human figure and both handles visible on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one rounded handle and minimal artwork, mostly showing the vase's patina and wear.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with another black-figure artwork, both handles visible, and more surface wear apparent.
description_view_3: Side view with the other handle, minimal artwork, and visible patina and discoloration.
attribute_pattern: figurative motifs with human figures and decorative bands
